problem: The CLI provides ticket-centric collaboration (inspect, comments) but has no commands related to product ownership, director assignment, approval workflows, or team alignment visibility.

files.why: Lists ticket comments with filtering (--helix-only, --since). The only CLI surface for collaborative discussion.
Posts comments to tickets. Used by workflow agents for @Helix responses. No director-awareness in the command.
Read-only database query execution. Could be used to query ownership data but not purpose-built for it.
CLI entry point and command routing. Three command families: login, inspect, comments.

facts: Comments system supports HELIX_TICKET_ID env var for agent integration.
No test or lint scripts defined in package.json.
Build command: `npm run build` (tsc), `npm run typecheck` (tsc --noEmit).
unknowns: Should the CLI surface director/ownership information (e.g., 'hlx tickets --directed-by-me' or 'hlx ticket status' showing director)?
Is the CLI relevant to this research ticket or is it context-only?
